index.title: r3frag.me
index.description: r3frag.me is a static archive of fragments. An ongoing refragmenting of a life expressed through science, art, and thread.
index.byline:
r3frag.me is a static archive of fragments.
An ongoing refragmenting of a life expressed through science, art, and thread.

science.title: Science
science.description: Science fragments from the r3frag.me archive.
science.intro: Short fragments for what I’m testing, what I’m questioning, and what follows if it’s true.

art.title: Art
art.description: Art fragments from the r3frag.me archive.
art.intro: Images and brief captions kept in the same chronological language as the archive.

thread.title: Thread
thread.description: Thread fragments from the r3frag.me archive.
thread.intro: Short fragments for recurrence, relationship, and the quiet logic between things.
